---
title: "Basant Saud"
subtitle: "| Research Assistant | Immunology & Virology | Veterianrian |"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website for Basant"
image: files/profiles/basant.png
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:saudbasant.vet@gmail.com 
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vet-basant/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/my-orcid?orcid=0000-0002-9851-1807
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7v5sc4sAAAAJ
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}
Hello, I am Basant Saud.


:::
